justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions from the user throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered only one alternative at a time, which led to a very long and unproductive conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent engaged in multiple avoidable round-trips by only offering one alternative at a time and then having that alternative be unavailable.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was extremely frustrating due to the agent repeatedly offering single, unavailable slots, leading to a prolonged and ultimately unsuccessful interaction.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent's recovery was poor as it repeatedly offered single, unavailable slots, failing to intelligently expand its search or offer a broader range of options after multiple rejections.

overall_notes: The agent's inability to offer multiple available slots at once, coupled with the repeated unavailability of the single slots it did offer, made this a highly frustrating and inefficient interaction for the user.
